phases.title: Foundation
phases.description: Xcode project, Expo Bare setup, App Store Connect, cloud backend skeleton, user accounts, library scanner, basic playback. Nothing else works without this.

features.title: Xcode project + Expo Bare setup
features.description: Initialize React Native Expo Bare project targeting iOS, iPadOS, tvOS, macOS. Configure build schemes, signing, and bundle identifiers for all four targets.

features.title: App Store Connect records
features.description: Create app records for iOS, iPadOS, tvOS, and macOS in App Store Connect. Configure TestFlight for internal testing.

features.title: Cloud backend skeleton
features.description: Provision cloud hosting (Railway, Fly.io, or Render). Initialize backend service with health endpoint, environment config, and PostgreSQL database connection.

features.title: User accounts + auth
features.description: User registration, login, and session management via Clerk or Auth0. user_id FK present on all database records from day one. Auth middleware stub in app — bypassed locally, enabled for commercial launch.

features.title: Household profiles
features.description: Multi-profile support within a single account. Each profile has its own play history, favorites, watch status, and preferences. Profile switcher in settings.

features.title: Library scanner — SMB + local + USB-C
features.description: Scan music library from three source types: NAS via SMB share, local device storage, and external USB-C drive (iPadOS 13+ Files app access). Index files into local SQLite cache. Formats: FLAC, ALAC, MP3, AAC, WAV, AIFF.

features.title: Basic local file playback
features.description: Play indexed local files on device. Play, pause, skip, seek, volume. No zones yet — device speaker only. Foundation for all playback features.

features.title: Local SQLite cache
features.description: Per-device SQLite database for offline library index, play queue, and cached metadata. Syncs with cloud backend when online.

features.title: GitHub repo
features.description: Create github.com/tomfo/sorriva. Initialize with README, .gitignore, branch protection on main.

features.title: sessions.json + roadmap-data.json initialized
features.description: Initialize velocity tracking and roadmap files. sessions.json carries forward entries from planning sessions.

phases.title: Music Graph
phases.description: MusicBrainz MBID matching, source de-duplication, unified track model, metadata enrichment pipeline. Everything else depends on the graph.

features.title: Unified music graph data model
features.description: Core Track entity with source array (local, Spotify, Apple Music, Qobuz). One track identity across all sources. Source resolved at playback time. Schema supports user_id, play count, last played, playlist membership.

features.title: MusicBrainz MBID matching
features.description: Assign canonical MusicBrainz IDs to local library tracks. Acoustic fingerprinting via AcoustID for files without embedded IDs. Cross-platform ID mapping to bridge Spotify IDs and Apple Music IDs. 90%+ match rate target; flag low-confidence matches for manual review.

features.title: Cross-source de-duplication
features.description: Identify tracks available in multiple sources (local + Spotify + Apple Music). Present as single track entry with source list. 'Available on X sources' indicator. User configures preferred source order in settings.

features.title: Context-aware source resolution
features.description: At playback time: detect home network vs away. Home = local FLAC preferred, fallback to Apple Music then Spotify. Away = Apple Music then Spotify. Transparent to user — it just plays. Network detection uses local IP range check.

features.title: Metadata pipeline — album art
features.description: Fetch and cache hi-res album art for all library tracks. Multiple sizes (thumbnail, full, backdrop). Served from local cache. Sources: embedded file tags, MusicBrainz Cover Art Archive, iTunes Search API fallback.

features.title: Metadata pipeline — bio, reviews, credits
features.description: Artist biography (Last.fm primary, Discogs fallback). Album reviews (Pitchfork, AllMusic, RateYourMusic). Credits — producer, engineer, session musicians (MusicBrainz). Genre/tags (Last.fm + MusicBrainz). Related artists.

features.title: Source badge system
features.description: Visual source attribution on every track cell and now playing screen. Spotify green, Apple Music gradient, Qobuz blue, local library icon. Always visible, never hidden. Core to the product's honest positioning.

features.title: Play history + statistics tracking
features.description: Log every play event: track, source, profile, timestamp, duration played. Per-profile play count, last played date, total hours. Foundation for Deriva AI and annual wrap-up.

phases.title: Streaming Sources
phases.description: Spotify Connect, MusicKit (Apple Music), Qobuz Connect, context-aware source resolution. Core value proposition.

features.title: Spotify Connect integration
features.description: In-app Spotify playback via Spotify Connect API. Sorriva controls playback; Spotify streams directly to device. No Spotify app UI shown. Source badge displays Spotify logo. Premium required. Catalog search, library browse, playlist import.

features.title: Apple Music — MusicKit integration
features.description: In-app Apple Music playback via MusicKit framework. Full catalog search and streaming inside Sorriva UI. Apple Music developer entitlement required. Library sync from user's Apple Music library.

features.title: Qobuz Connect integration
features.description: In-app Qobuz hi-res streaming via Qobuz Connect API. Catalog search, library browse, hi-res quality selection. Source badge displays Qobuz logo.

features.title: iHeartRadio — live radio stations
features.description: Live radio station search and playback via iHeartRadio API. Station browse by genre/location. Integration depth TBD — see open questions.

features.title: Streaming service connection settings
features.description: Settings screen for connecting/disconnecting streaming services. OAuth flow per service. Shows connection status, account info, and subscription tier. User configures preferred source order for context-aware resolution.

phases.title: Zones & AirPlay 2
phases.description: AirPlay 2 multi-room, device discovery, saved groups, EQService abstraction, Sonos/BluOS control layer. Multi-room is core value.

features.title: Unified device discovery
features.description: Discover all audio endpoints on the local network: AirPlay 2 devices via mDNS/Bonjour, Sonos via local API, Bluesound via BluOS. Present as one unified zone list. No protocol awareness required from user. Sonos native groups and stereo pairs surface as single zones.

features.title: Sonos native group + stereo pair preservation
features.description: Sonos hardware groups and stereo pairs are defined at firmware level and must be respected as-is. Sorriva discovers and treats them as single opaque zones. Never regroups or breaks Sonos native configuration. Users do not need to regroup anything in Sorriva.

features.title: AirPlay 2 multi-room streaming
features.description: Simultaneous playback to multiple AirPlay 2 endpoints. Independent volume per zone. Latency-matched sync handled by AirPlay 2 protocol. Apple TV initiates streams natively.

features.title: Saved zone groups
features.description: User creates named zone groups (e.g. 'Downstairs', 'Party Mode', 'Bedroom Only') combining any mix of AirPlay 2 endpoints. One tap to recall — Sorriva automates multi-target AirPlay 2 selection. Groups persist across sessions. Each member zone maintains its own internal Sonos/Bluesound configuration.

features.title: Ad-hoc zone groups
features.description: Temporary zone groupings for the current session. Dissolve when session ends. Quick-create from zone list without naming or saving.

features.title: EQService abstraction layer
features.description: Single EQ UI (bass, mid, treble, loudness toggle) that translates to each device's native API. Sonos HTTP API: bass, treble, loudness, balance, Trueplay status. BluOS API: tone controls. Plain AirPlay 2 (HomePod etc.): volume only with honest reduced-state explanation. New device type = new driver, UI unchanged.

features.title: Sonos local API control layer
features.description: Sonos HTTP API integration for device configuration: bass, treble, loudness, balance, Trueplay status read/write. Volume control. Runs in parallel with AirPlay 2 audio delivery — separate layers, not mutually exclusive.

features.title: BluOS API control layer
features.description: Bluesound BluOS HTTP API integration for device configuration: EQ, tone controls, balance, device config. Volume control. Runs in parallel with AirPlay 2 audio delivery.

features.title: Per-zone and per-group volume control
features.description: Independent volume control for each zone and each saved group. Via AirPlay 2 protocol for audio level, supplemented by device native API where available.

phases.title: UI — iPhone & iPad
phases.description: Library, Now Playing, Artist, Album, Zones, Queue, Settings screens. Proven UI before TV.

features.title: Library screen — album grid + list
features.description: Unified album grid and list toggle. Shows local library and streaming service libraries merged. Source badges on all entries. Filter by genre, decade, source, unplayed. Sort by title, year, date added, play count, rating. Search across all sources.

features.title: Now Playing screen
features.description: Full album art, track info, scrub bar, volume, source badge, zone indicator. Content tabs: Info / Review / Credits / Lyrics. Queue peek. AirPlay 2 zone selector. Like/favorite action.

features.title: Artist screen
features.description: Artist bio, stats, full discography across all sources, related artists rail. Albums sorted by year. 'Play all' and 'Shuffle' actions.

features.title: Album screen
features.description: Album art (full bleed), track list with play counts, album review, credits panel, source availability row. All tracks show which sources they're available on.

features.title: Zones panel
features.description: Unified device list: all AirPlay 2 endpoints, Sonos zones, Bluesound zones in one list. Saved group recall. Ad-hoc group creation. Per-zone EQ panel. Volume controls. Active zone indicator. Zone status (playing/idle/offline).

features.title: Play queue
features.description: Current queue with drag-to-reorder. Play next vs add to end. Save queue as playlist. Clear queue. Session history — view and replay past sessions. Significantly more capable than Sonos/Bluesound queue implementations.

features.title: Universal search
features.description: Single search across local library, Spotify catalog, Apple Music catalog, Qobuz catalog. Results grouped by source. Instant local results; streaming results load progressively. Tap result to go to artist, album, or add to queue.

features.title: Favorites + playlists
features.description: Favorite tracks, albums, artists per profile. User-created playlists — add from any source. Playlist detail with mixed-source track list and source badges. Smart playlists (rules-based) deferred to Phase 8.

features.title: Settings screen
features.description: Library source configuration (SMB paths, local, USB-C). Streaming service connections. Household profile management. Preferred source order. Network home detection config. Offline download management.

features.title: Offline downloads — owned music
features.description: Mark albums, playlists, or tracks as 'available offline'. Sorriva downloads from local library to device storage. Mixed playlist offline state — clear visual treatment: checkmark (downloaded) vs cloud icon (needs network). Streaming service downloads remain DRM-sandboxed — accepted limitation.

phases.title: Apple TV
phases.description: Lean-back browse, Deriva prompt, zone control, cinematic now playing. Primary living room client.

features.title: Apple TV — cinematic now playing
features.description: Full-bleed album art backdrop, track info overlay, source badge, zone status. Focus ring navigation. Info / Review / Credits content tabs. Lean-back optimized — minimal interaction required during playback.

features.title: Apple TV — library browse
features.description: Poster grid with focus-ring navigation optimized for 10-foot experience. Filter rail: genre, decade, source, unplayed. Sort control. Recently Added and Continue Listening rails.

features.title: Apple TV — universal search
features.description: On-screen keyboard search across all sources. Results grouped clearly. Optimized for remote navigation.

features.title: Apple TV — zone control
features.description: Zone selector overlay during playback. Saved group recall. Volume per zone. AirPlay 2 target management from Apple TV.

features.title: Apple TV — Deriva AI prompt entry
features.description: Natural language prompt entry on Apple TV home screen. On-screen keyboard or iPhone/iPad as keyboard via Continuity. Returns curated shortlist with one-line reasoning per pick.

features.title: Apple TV — home screen
features.description: Continue Listening rail. Recently Added rail. Deriva suggestion strip. Quick access to saved zone groups. Source status indicators.

features.title: iPhone as Apple TV remote
features.description: iPhone and iPad act as full remote controllers for Apple TV Sorriva session. Play/pause/skip, volume, zone switching, queue management — all from phone while Apple TV displays now playing.

phases.title: Deriva AI
phases.description: AI playlists, discovery, skip learning, library rediscovery. Needs library + play history data to be useful.

features.title: Deriva — mood/context AI playlists
features.description: Natural language playlist generation from full music graph. Examples: 'Sunday Morning Coffee', 'Late Night Drive', 'Dinner Party'. Draws from local library and all connected streaming services. Profile-aware. Returns playlist with reasoning — explains the thread connecting choices.

features.title: Deriva — music discovery
features.description: Analyzes most played tracks, artists, genres across all sources. 'Music just like this' from any artist or track. Gateway albums — 'if you love X, here's Y you haven't explored'. Deep cuts surfacing per artist. Sources: MusicBrainz + Last.fm similarity APIs.

features.title: Deriva — skip pattern learning
features.description: Track skips and abandons across all sources. Learn genre, era, style avoidance patterns per profile. Stop including patterns that consistently get skipped. Improve playlist and auto-play quality over time.

features.title: Deriva — library rediscovery
features.description: Surface forgotten and unplayed albums in library. 'You added this 3 years ago and never played it.' Cross-reference with listening patterns to find likely matches. Scheduled rediscovery suggestions.

features.title: Auto Play
features.description: Continuous play seeded from currently playing track. Tightness dial: strict (same genre/era) to open (anything goes). Pulls from local library and streaming services. Powered by Last.fm similar tracks API + Deriva pattern learning.

features.title: Deriva — contextual soft signals
features.description: Time-of-day and seasonal awareness as soft signals for playlist generation. Optional weather API integration. Signals inform but don't hard-filter — AI weighs them naturally.

phases.title: Extended
phases.description: Offline downloads, vinyl library, Billboard archive, Shazam, stats, CarPlay, Mac bridge, watchOS. Polish and differentiation.

features.title: Vinyl library — collection management
features.description: Separate vinyl collection module. Manual entry or barcode scan. Discogs API for metadata (pressing info, matrix numbers, label variants). Fields: title, artist, label, catalog number, pressing, year, format (LP/Single/EP/78), condition (Goldmine scale), purchase price/date. Collection browser, value estimator (Discogs marketplace), wantlist, duplicates detection. 'You own this digitally too' cross-reference. Export CSV/PDF for insurance.

features.title: Deriva — vinyl recommendations
features.description: Cross-reference digital listening patterns against vinyl collection. 'Based on your digital listening, here are records you should own.' Surfaces gaps and acquisition targets.

features.title: Billboard archive
features.description: Annual Top 100 every year from 1955 to present. Browse by year or decade. Each entry resolves to best available source (local → Apple Music → Spotify). 'You own X of the [year] Top 100' stat per year.

features.title: Shazam integration
features.description: Read Shazam library and generate playlist. Resolve each tag to local library → subscribed service → fallback. Best-effort write-back sync via Apple's limited Shazam API.

features.title: Playback statistics
features.description: Albums, tracks, artists, genres, decades — all ranked by play count across all sources. Total hours played, total tracks, total albums. Session history. Annual wrap-up — 'your year in music'.

features.title: iOS widgets
features.description: Now Playing widget (art, track, controls). Zone selector widget. Quick play favorites widget. Via react-native-widget-extension.

features.title: Apple CarPlay
features.description: Playback control while driving. Requires Apple CarPlay entitlement. React Native CarPlay community library. Browse recently played, favorites, Deriva playlists. Play/pause/skip/volume only — no complex navigation.

features.title: Mac library bridge
features.description: Optional Mac app that runs as a menu bar agent on a home Mac. Scans attached drives/NAS. Exposes local library remotely via cloud backend relay. Enables full library access anywhere without VPN or Tailscale. Users without Mac bridge get streaming services fallback when away from home.

features.title: Smart playlists
features.description: Rules-based auto-generated playlists: genre + decade + unplayed + minimum play count + source combinations. Auto-update as library grows. Similar to iTunes Smart Playlists but cross-source.

features.title: watchOS app
features.description: Basic playback controls and Now Playing display on Apple Watch. Play/pause/skip/volume. Complications for current track. Scope TBD — deferred until iPhone UI is proven.

features.title: SiriusXM integration
features.description: Satellite radio via sxm-player library. Subscription required. Legal posture for personal use TBD. Deferred pending decision.
